name: ANUM
summary: A qualification framework that prioritizes Authority, Need, Urgency, and Money so the rep learns quickly whether the deal can realistically move.
whenToUseIt: Use ANUM when you want a faster, front-loaded qualification check on whether the buyer has influence, pain, urgency, and commercial viability.
steps: Establish whether the buyer has authority or access to the real decision-maker.
Confirm a meaningful need and whether it is urgent enough to drive change.
Validate that there is money or a path to funding if the need is real.
example: An inbound lead sounds interested, but ANUM reveals they are only gathering options for next year, have no internal sponsor, and no urgency tied to a real event. The rep avoids over-investing too early.
